parameters.query: SELECT r.id as route_id, r.route_number, r.zip_code, r.spaces_available, c.name as city, c.state_code FROM routes r JOIN cities c ON r.city_id = c.id WHERE r.status IN ('available', 'filling') AND r.spaces_available > 0 AND c.status = 'active' ORDER BY r.priority DESC LIMIT 5

meta.description: Route-aware email outreach. Runs daily, picks top 5 routes with available spaces, sends Step 1 email to 10 new prospects per route. Emails are personalized with route/zip info.
sequence: Step 2 (Day 3): Social proof — 'X businesses in your area already signed up'
Step 3 (Day 8): Urgency — 'Only X spaces left in Route Y'
requirements: Routes and prospects must exist in database
